name: Starter Outreach Pack
description: Sequences, discovery emails, objection replies for cold outbound

prompts.title: Cold Email Sequence - 5 Touch
prompts.prompt:
Write a 5-email cold outreach sequence for {{ICP}} selling {{PRODUCT}}.

Constraints:
- Email 1: Problem-agitate-solution, <120 words, one clear CTA (reply)
- Email 2: Social proof + one specific metric, <100 words
- Email 3: Different angle (risk/cost of inaction), <100 words
- Email 4: Break-up email, <60 words, permission to close file
- Email 5: Pattern interrupt (loom/video/asset), <80 words

Tone: Direct, no fluff, no "I hope this finds you well." No exclamation marks.
ICP details: {{ICP_DETAILS}}
Product: {{PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION}}
Key metric: {{KEY_METRIC}}
prompts.notes: Replace {{}} variables per campaign. Test subject lines separately. Send Tue-Thu 10am-2pm recipient time.

prompts.title: LinkedIn Connection + DM Sequence
prompts.prompt:
Write a LinkedIn connection request (300 char limit) + 3 follow-up DMs for {{ICP}}.

Connection: No pitch. Context + relevance only.
DM 1 (day 2): One insight about their space + soft ask
DM 2 (day 5): Case study snippet (1 sentence) + "worth a chat?"
DM 3 (day 10): Break-up - "I'll stop here, let me know if priorities shift"

ICP: {{ICP_DETAILS}}
Your credibility: {{YOUR_PROOF}}
prompts.notes: Only connect with 2nd-degree or group-shared. Personalize connection note with specific trigger.

prompts.title: Objection Handling Library
prompts.prompt:
Generate direct replies for the top 5 objections for {{PRODUCT}} selling to {{ICP}}:

1. "We're already using [competitor]"
2. "Not a priority right now"
3. "Budget's locked for this quarter"
4. "Send me info / I'll review"
5. "We build this internally"

Format per objection:
- Acknowledge (1 sentence)
- Pivot (reframe)
- Proof point (1 metric or logo)
- Low-friction CTA (reply / 10-min call / loom)

Product: {{PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION}}
Differentiator: {{KEY_DIFFERENTIATOR}}
prompts.notes: Keep each reply <80 words. No "I understand" filler. Price objection = not in top 5 for this ICP.

prompts.title: Referral / Warm Intro Request
prompts.prompt:
Write a referral request email to {{CONNECTION_NAME}} asking for intro to {{TARGET_NAME}} at {{TARGET_COMPANY}}.

Structure:
- Context: Why this specific person (1 sentence)
- Value: What target gets from the call (1 outcome)
- Easy out: "No pressure if not a fit"
- Forwardable blurb: 3 lines they can paste

Your relationship: {{RELATIONSHIP_CONTEXT}}
Target's likely pain: {{TARGET_PAIN}}
prompts.notes: Send to connectors who owe you social capital, not random contacts.
